blended.narrative: Stevens Pass is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 20 inches of snowfall of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 1,201 ft. Looking ahead, 55 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Tomorrow: 11" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 13" of heavy snow, highs of 36°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 18" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Base has been melting — down 4" over the past week. Current depth: 31".
